category_sources: source_facts.description says pyenv-virtualenv is a pyenv plugin to manage virtualenv; official README also mentions conda environments.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives pyenv-virtualenv; official repository title uses pyenv-virtualenv.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents pyenv-virtualenv installation, usage, activation, deletion, and environment variables.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pyenv/pyenv-virtualenv, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify virtualenv and conda environment management for pyenv.
